body:
1. Add as another default scheduled action 

2. Check period is like 14 days? 

3. When there is a new update, create a new pr (use the update skills)

@sepo-agent Does it make sense? Would it be too annoying?

comments.body:
I triaged this as a `create-action` request.

I’ll prepare a scheduled GitHub Action proposal to check Sepo agent updates every 14 days and open a PR when updates are available.

Reply with:

```text
@sepo-agent /approve req-53cdb7
```

to start the action creation workflow.

<!-- sepo-agent-request base64:_ -->

Sepo adopted this issue as a sub-orchestrator child of #107.

| Parent issue | Stage | Parent round | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| #107 | biweekly-update-check | 2 | Running |

<!-- sepo-sub-orchestrator parent:107 stage:biweekly-update-check state:done parent_round:2 -->
<!-- sepo-sub-orchestrator-adoption -->

Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `orchestrate` -> `delegate_issue` (round 2/10).

agent planner selected child issue delegation: Latest human input explicitly asks to skip failed child #94 and work on existing open issue #27 instead. #27 is a distinct child workstream for biweekly Sepo update checks; PR #115 for #94 is closed/failed, so it should not be reused.

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777792209886 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUyNzI3MTI1Mjc6b3JjaGVzdHJhdGU6MTA3OmRlbGVnYXRlX2lzc3VlOjI3OjI -->

Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `orchestrate` -> `implement` (round 2/10).

manual orchestrate start on issue; dispatching implement

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777792221931 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUyNzI3MTI1Mjc6b3JjaGVzdHJhdGU6Mjc6aW1wbGVtZW50OjI3OjI -->

**Sepo implementation finished**

- Branch: `agent/implement-issue-27/codex-25272756852`
- Pull request: https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/116

Added a default near-biweekly Sepo update workflow that runs the existing update-agent skill, skips before provider/runtime setup when scheduling is disabled or an update PR is already open, and documents the new maintenance path. Verified with build, focused Node tests, shell syntax checks, workflow YAML parsing, and diff hygiene.

title: Automatically check sepo agent updates
